example_project.name: VibeKB
example_project.note: This is VibeKB's own living software model — VibeKB explaining VibeKB. The source it describes is THIS repository (cubixmeow-commits/VibeKB). Bundled example models of other applications live under examples/ (see examples/sousmeow/.vibekb) and are NOT the active model; do not confuse them with the current state of VibeKB.

provenance.name: VibeKB
provenance.verification_scope: Documentation-claims lint added as `check` section [5] (tools/vibekb.php): verified manually 2026-07-23 — clean pass on the real repo (14 root docs), negative tests confirm each sub-check fails on injected drift (bogus vibekb.php subcommand, bogus vibekb command, broken link, bogus .vibekb/ structure entry), and the Go-source-absent path skips instead of false-flagging. php -l tools/vibekb.php clean; validate 0 errors; test-topology OK. detect-drift record and change record check-watches-front-door-docs updated.
provenance.freshness_note: VibeKB does not update this model on its own. An AI agent keeps it synchronized while developing VibeKB, following the workflow in CLAUDE.md. `source_commit` records the commit the model was last reconciled against; run `php tools/vibekb.php check` to see what has changed since — drift is detected mechanically, but interpreting a change into the model still requires an agent.

structure.project: project/ — identity, intent, current state, constraints
structure.system: system/ — mental model, components, flows, storage, deployment
structure.memory: memory/ — decisions, constraints, assumptions, warnings, discoveries, changes
structure.work: work/ — current AI work, handoff, sessions
